calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Assets Of Trust And Confirming Identity And Powers Of Trustee
Off Calendar Oct-28-2020 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Confirming Assets Of Trust And Confirming Identity And Powers Of Trustee
Off Calendar Sep-30-2020 Continued To Oct-28-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Approving Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Feb-18-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Joseph Ferucci for Kate Cook.
Anna Nicolopulos for Phylis Erickson (Trustee).
Timothy Chambers for Christopher Guthrie (Beneficiary).

Mr. Chambers provided a cover sheet for the original 13100 affidavit signed by Christopher Guthrie. The Court noted that no one is objecting. All Counsel indicated that they are still following the process that was provided in the petition. The Petition for Order Approving Settlement Agreement is under submission to grant as soon as the death certificate and the 13100 affidavit is filed. Mr. Ferrucci stated that he will be filing a request to withdraw the Petition for Removal of Trustee, etc. pursuant to the settlement agreement. The Petition for Removal of Trustee, etc. is off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

Petition For Removal Of Trustee Of Family Trust; For Fiduciary Accounts; For Confirmation Of Assets Of Family Trust; And Objection To Proposed Action
Off Calendar Feb-04-2020 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Approving Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Jan-14-2020 Continued To Feb-04-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Removal Of Trustee Of Family Trust; For Fiduciary Accounts; For Confirmation Of Assets Of Family Trust; And Objection To Proposed Action
Off Calendar Jan-14-2020 Continued To Feb-04-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Approving Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Dec-24-2019 Continued To Jan-14-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Edward Broitman for Kate and Abby Young (Beneficiaries) via Court Call.
Anna Nicolopulos for Phyllis Erickson (Petitioner/Trustee).
Timothy J. Chambers for Christopher Guthrie (Beneficiary).

Ms. Nicolopulos stated she has 13100 declaration and will file it today along with Rachel's declaration, that there is no death certificate, but she has a report of death of US citizen dying abroad (Italy) certified by the State Dept. Mr. Chambers stated all are committed to getting funds out of trust as soon as possible.
The Petition for Removal of Trustee of Family Trust, etc., and Petition for Order Approving Settlement Agreement are continued to January 14, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition For Removal Of Trustee Of Family Trust; For Fiduciary Accounts; For Confirmation Of Assets Of Family Trust; And Objection To Proposed Action
Off Calendar Dec-24-2019 Continued To Jan-14-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Ex Parte Petition To Advance Hearing Date
Off Calendar Oct-03-2019 Denied

Petition For Removal Of Trustee Of Family Trust; For Fiduciary Accounts; For Confirmation Of Assets Of Family Trust; And Objection To Proposed Action
Off Calendar Aug-27-2019 Continued To Oct-15-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Joseph Ferrucci appeared by telephone for Petitioner.
Anna Nicolopulos for Phyllis Erickson (Trustee).

Ms. Nicolopulos stated that they came to an agreement as of yesterday and that they are awaiting signatures from all Parties. Mr. Ferrucci stated that they should have the remaining signatures in the next few days, that the Trustee will petition for Court approval of the agreement and requested that the Court maintain a status hearing on calendar for 30-days. The Petition for Removal of Trustee of Family Trust, etc. is continued to October 15, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Counsel that the petition for approval of the settlement agreement will be given its own hearing date and that they will then be in a position to take this petition off calendar, or have it continued to the same date given to the settlement agreement.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition For Removal Of Trustee Of Family Trust; For Fiduciary Accounts; For Confirmation Of Assets Of Family Trust; And Objection To Proposed Action
Off Calendar Jul-30-2019 Continued To Aug-27-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Joseph Ferrucci for Kate Cook (Petitioner).
Ana Nicolopulos for Phyllis Erickson (Trustee).

Mr. Ferrucci requested a three to four week continuance stating that they are still working on settlement, that he received a draft from Mr. Chambers, that they have exchanged comments, that they had a telephone conference yesterday and made some progress, and that they need more time to achieve settlement. The Petition for Removal of Trustee of Family Trust, etc. is continued to August 27, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition For Removal Of Trustee Of Family Trust; For Fiduciary Accounts; For Confirmation Of Assets Of Family Trust; And Objection To Proposed Action
Off Calendar Jun-25-2019 Continued To Jul-30-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Joseph Ferrucci for Petitioner and appearing on behalf of all parties.

Mr. Ferrucci stated that they are working on and making progress on a settlement proposal, that he received a draft of the settlement agreement from Mr. Chambers, that they stipulated to move forward with the sale of the Chestnut Street property, that the property sold in June and that the settlement will need Court approval. The Petition for Removal of Trustee of Family Trust, etc. is continued to July 30, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
